project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo with turbo build system (Quant Ecosystem)
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Each package has tsconfig.json extending root. Packages use 'tsc --noEmit' for typecheck, 'vitest run' for test.
test_framework: vitest with globals enabled. Tests in src/__tests__/*.test.ts. Pattern: import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
verification_instructions: Run pnpm --filter @quant/photos typecheck && pnpm --filter @quant/photos test && pnpm --filter @quant/photos lint
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root. No additional setup needed.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22, pnpm 10.28.1. Must create new branch feat/phase-44-photo-editors from current branch.
contribution_requirements: Max 500 LOC per PR (new lines added). Commit message: feat(photos): add AI photo editors with inference runtime and edit history
key_patterns: Packages: package.json (private, type:module, main:src/index.ts), tsconfig.json (extends ../../tsconfig.json). Imports use .js extension. Interfaces in types or dedicated type files. Mock providers for testing. Classes implement interfaces. Current package has ~633 lines. New code must be under 500 LOC total.
directory_structure: packages/photos/src/ with subdirs: ai/, editors/, library/, search/, __tests__/. New files go in editors/ subdirectory and __tests__/
